inputs.label: Velocity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Velocity factor of wire or cable. 0.95 for bare copper, 0.66 for insulated wire

inputs.label: Wavelength Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of wavelength. Use 0.5 for half-wave dipole, 1.0 for full-wave

inputs.label: End Effect Correction
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment factor for end effect. Use 0.95-0.98 for practical shortening

formulas.lengthInSelectedUnit: unitSelection === 0 ? 492 * velocityFactor * wavelengthFraction * endEffectCorrection / frequency : 300 * velocityFactor * wavelengthFraction * endEffectCorrection / frequency
